fields.acceptance_criteria: 1) WgpuOverlay component, overlay-api, gpu-init, gpu-buffers, gpu-render-loop, element-scanner, element-types, WGSL shaders, thumbnail-capture moved to viewer-api/frontend. 2) effects/palette.ts+WGSL moved to viewer-api/frontend. 3) log-viewer imports from viewer-api instead of local copies. 4) ticket-viewer imports WgpuOverlay and renders dependency graph with GPU pipeline replacing SVG GraphView. 5) @webgpu/types added to viewer-api devDependencies.
fields.title: Feature: Extract WgpuOverlay/effects to viewer-api and GPU dependency graph in ticket-viewer
